title: Rouh
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Rouh''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] freighter destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilot [[Dev]] when he accidentally found himself in an Imperial training area. The incident was ported into a simulated exercise for Rebel pilots.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
